headline: S&P 500, Nasdaq under pressure as chip stocks see red
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are mixed ahead of Tuesday's market close as the Nasdaq Composite drops by over 1%, pushed lower by declines in chip stocks. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the market reaction to the April Consumer Price Index (CPI) report released this morning.

headline: Walmart Expands Wellness Partners To Support Loyalty And Store Differentiation
summary: Walmart is expanding distribution for several third party brands, including Buda Juice, Axil Brands, Rogue snacks, and O Positiv Health, across its U.S. stores. The rollouts focus on wellness, nutrition, women's health, and sporting goods, with some products launching on an exclusive basis at Walmart. This product push reflects a broader effort to widen Walmart's in store assortment in categories that can attract new shoppers and repeat visits. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, this...

headline: Amazon offering a new 30-minute delivery space
summary: Amazon (AMZN) is launching 30-minute deliveries throughout US cities as part of its Prime Now service, with plans to make this available in most areas 24 hours a day.  Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses this new service and what it means for the broader express delivery space, especially as more companies employ the use of delivery robots.
